case_title: WEST BUILDERS, INC. VS. THE PLACE AT WASHINGTON SQUARE LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST BUILDERS, INC. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-31-2018 CONTINUED TO DEC-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62711720)
